items.claim: Adrian Yanez has the ability to land a dangerous 10-8 round in the first round.
items.quote: that 10-8 in round three was dangerous. And if he can start that way, he does start slow, but if he can if he can start that way in round one against Cody, which I think he will.

items.claim: Cody Garbrandt gets hit a lot in his fights.
items.quote: Cody gets hit a lot though.

items.claim: Cody Garbrandt lacks the willingness to dig deep if he is losing on the scorecards.
items.quote: Cody doesn't want to fight. He won't dig deep if he's down on the scorecards.

items.claim: Adrian Yanez was dropped and TKO'd by Rob Font.
items.quote: Adrian Yanez got dropped by Rob Font. Like who gets dropped by Rob Font and TKO'd by Rob Font?

items.claim: Alisha Allenson was finished by KO in the first round by Brandon Perisic.
items.quote: He lost to Paku. Lost to Pacu by KO in the first round... Brandon Perisic finished him bad in that first round.

items.claim: Robert Whittaker's move up to light heavyweight is a good move.
items.quote: I think there's a good move up to light heavyweight, though.

items.claim: Robert Whittaker utilizes a high volume of straight shots.
items.quote: Robert Whittaker does have a lot of straight shots.
